manifest.description: Phase 1 Round 1: Cost-engine foundation tasks (no dependencies, can run in parallel)

tasks.title: Decompose operating_cost_pct into platform x category fee table
tasks.description: Replace flat operating_cost_pct (0.25) with structured PLATFORM_FEES lookup keyed on (platform, category). Real Amazon fees in India vary 5-30% by category.
key_changes: config/settings.py - add PLATFORM_FEES dict with 3+ platforms x 10+ categories
intelligence/profit.py - replace flat fee with table lookup
acceptance_criteria: PLATFORM_FEES dict with Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho, B2B platforms
Settings dataclass exposes 4 new fields with defaults
BUY-basket ROI changes meaningfully on real manifest

tasks.title: Add inspection cost for not_tested / unknown
tasks.description: Add inspection cost model for items with not_tested or unknown condition status. Critical for cost accuracy on liquidation lots.
acceptance_criteria: Inspection cost applied per condition status
All condition statuses handled (tested, not_tested, unknown)

tasks.title: Add category-aware transport cost (weight tiers)
tasks.description: Implement category-aware transport cost with weight-based tiers instead of flat rate. Transport can be 5-15% of revenue depending on weight and destination.
key_changes: intelligence/profit.py - add weight-tier transport cost lookup
acceptance_criteria: Transport cost dict with category x weight tiers
Weight tiers defined for each category
Transport cost applied per row based on category and weight

tasks.title: Hard gate: low match_confidence downgrades BUY to REVIEW
tasks.description: Implement pricing confidence gate that downgrades low-confidence price matches from BUY to REVIEW recommendation. Prevents committing capital on uncertain pricing.
acceptance_criteria: Items below threshold automatically downgraded to REVIEW

execution_notes.parallel_execution: All 4 Round 1 tasks can execute in parallel - no inter-task dependencies
execution_notes.estimated_total_effort: 16 hours (4 tasks x avg 4h parallel execution)
quality_gates: Pipeline smoke test on real manifest
